name: claude-eng-toolkit
description: Opinionated Claude Code plugins that encode engineering team practices into automated tooling: strict types, secret scanning, test discipline, browser QA, and more

plugins.name: python-dev
plugins.description: Enforce strict Python type safety with zero workarounds (no Any, no cast, no type: ignore), systematic pytest workflows, and code smell detection

plugins.name: typescript-dev
plugins.description: Catch TypeScript type errors and lint issues at edit time in under 30 seconds, not at CI time 10 minutes later

plugins.name: browser-testing
plugins.description: Systematic browser QA with headless automation: walk through your app, capture screenshots, flag visual issues, and produce documented evidence

plugins.name: git-public
plugins.description: Scan staged files for secrets before commit, enforce semantic commit messages, and audit existing history for leaked credentials

plugins.name: dev-utils
plugins.description: Git worktree isolation with port offsets and env copying, parallel multi-agent implementation, GitHub releases, and development infrastructure

plugins.name: react-native-appium
plugins.description: TDD workflow for React Native E2E testing with Appium: Page Object patterns, accessibility-first selectors, and cross-platform test generation

plugins.name: openclaw
plugins.description: Standards and structure for writing OpenClaw skills: SKILL.md format, metadata gating, installer specs, and ClawHub distribution

plugins.name: testing
plugins.description: Zero-tolerance test failure discipline: every failure is investigated with evidence before moving on. No pre-existing, no flaky, no excuses.
